description.value: **Benefit:** You gain DR /â equal to half your favored enemy ( vermin ) bonus against vermin and creatures with the swarm subtype. When attempting Fortitude saves against a swarmâs distraction ability, you gain a bonus on the save equal to the damage prevented by this feat.
